description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style bookcase featuring five wide, rectangular wooden shelves supported by a sturdy black metal frame. The shelves are evenly spaced and have a rich, dark wood grain finish, providing ample storage or display space. The frame consists of four thick, square metal legs that extend slightly above the top shelf, adding to the structural integrity and visual weight of the piece. The right side of the bookcase has a unique stepped design, with the top shelf extending further than the others, creating an asymmetrical profile. The open-back construction allows for visibility and airflow, making it suitable for both storage and decorative purposes. Its overall appearance is modern yet functional, ideal for urban interiors such as lofts, offices, or contemporary living spaces.
description: A dark wood and black metal bookcase with five shelves and an industrial, asymmetrical design. The open-back frame and stepped top shelf give it a modern, urban look.
description_view_0: The bookcase is seen from an angle highlighting the stepped top shelf and the open right side, with all five shelves visible.
description_view_1: Viewed from above, the asymmetrical extension of the top shelf and the even spacing of the shelves are clearly visible.
description_view_2: A straight-on view of the front, showing the full width of the shelves and the solid, rectangular frame.
description_view_3: The left side view emphasizes the depth of the shelves and the stepped design of the top shelf.
